metadata.name: confidential_token
metadata.description: Solana PoC confidential token using the Zama host program

docs: Anchor entrypoint module for the confidential token PoC.

instructions.name: close_consumed_burn_redemption_request
docs: Closes a consumed burn-redemption request witness.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Request owner and rent recipient.

accounts.name: redemption_request
docs: Consumed request witness to close.

instructions.name: close_consumed_disclosure_request
docs: Closes a consumed disclosure request witness.

accounts.name: requester
docs: Requester and rent recipient.

accounts.name: disclosure_request
docs: Consumed request witness to close.

instructions.name: close_expired_burn_redemption_request
docs: Closes an expired, unconsumed burn-redemption request witness.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Request owner and rent recipient.

accounts.name: redemption_request
docs: Expired request witness to close.

instructions.name: close_expired_disclosure_request
docs: Closes an expired, unconsumed disclosure request witness.

accounts.name: requester
docs: Requester and rent recipient.

accounts.name: disclosure_request
docs: Expired request witness to close.

instructions.name: confidential_burn
docs: Burns an encrypted amount by rotating the account balance and encrypted total supply.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Token owner and burn authority.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint whose encrypted total supply is decreased.

accounts.name: token_account
docs: Token account whose balance is decreased.

accounts.name: current_compute_acl
docs: Current balance ACL record used as the left-hand operand.

accounts.name: current_total_supply_acl
docs: Current total-supply ACL record used as the left-hand operand.

accounts.name: amount_compute_acl
docs: Encrypted burn amount ACL record.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used for FHE operations.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: ZamaHost config used for handle derivation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for ACL account creation.

instructions.name: confidential_call_transfer_receiver
docs: Calls an arbitrary receiver hook and verifies its encrypted callback-success result.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Original sender owner and rent payer for the hook invocation transaction.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

accounts.name: from_account
docs: Original sender token account.

accounts.name: to_account
docs: Original recipient token account.

accounts.name: sent_amount_acl
docs: ACL record for the prior transfer's all-or-zero sent amount.

accounts.name: callback_success_acl
docs: ACL record for the receiver-produced encrypted callback success bit.

accounts.name: hook_record
docs: One-shot marker for this receiver hook invocation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used to create the one-shot hook marker.

instructions.name: confidential_finalize_transfer_callback
docs: Finalizes a prepared callback settlement by crediting refund and recording final transfer.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Rent payer for final callback-settlement output accounts.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

accounts.name: from_account
docs: Original sender token account; receives any best-effort refund in this finalize step.

accounts.name: to_account
docs: Original recipient token account; must match the prepared settlement.

accounts.name: from_current_compute_acl
docs: Original sender current balance ACL record.

accounts.name: sent_amount_acl
docs: ACL record for the prior transfer's all-or-zero sent amount.

accounts.name: settlement_record
docs: Prepared callback settlement.

accounts.name: refund_amount_acl
docs: ACL record for the prepared refund amount.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used for FHE operations.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: ZamaHost config used for handle derivation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for ACL account creation.

instructions.name: confidential_prepare_transfer_callback
docs: Prepares receiver callback settlement by computing the encrypted refund.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Rent payer for callback-settlement output accounts.

accounts.name: callback_authority
docs: This authority is already enforced by the callback-success ACL record; it
does not sign settlement so a failed callback can be refunded without
recipient cooperation after the hook.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

accounts.name: from_account
docs: Original sender token account.

accounts.name: to_account
docs: Original recipient token account; pays any best-effort refund in this prepare step.

accounts.name: to_current_compute_acl
docs: Original recipient current balance ACL record.

accounts.name: sent_amount_acl
docs: ACL record for the prior transfer's all-or-zero sent amount.

accounts.name: callback_success_acl
docs: ACL record for the encrypted callback success bit.

accounts.name: hook_record
docs: Verified receiver-hook invocation for this sent amount.

accounts.name: settlement_record
docs: Replay marker for this callback settlement.

accounts.name: zama_program
docs: ZamaHost program used for FHE operations.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: ZamaHost config used for handle derivation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program used for ACL and replay-marker account creation.

instructions.name: confidential_transfer
docs: Transfers an encrypted amount by rotating the sender and recipient balance handles.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Sender and transfer authority.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent for output ACL records.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

accounts.name: from_account
docs: Sender token account.

accounts.name: from_current_compute_acl
docs: Sender current balance ACL record.

accounts.name: to_current_compute_acl
docs: Recipient current balance ACL record.

docs: Encrypted amount ACL record.

docs: ZamaHost program used for FHE operations.

accounts.name: host_config
docs: ZamaHost config used for handle derivation.

accounts.name: system_program

errors.name: OwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Token owner does not match signer

errors.name: MintMismatch
errors.msg: Token account mint does not match

errors.name: MintAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Confidential mint account is invalid

errors.name: InvalidMintConfig
errors.msg: Confidential mint config is invalid

errors.name: MintAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: Confidential mint authority does not match signer

errors.name: UnexpectedRemainingAccounts
errors.msg: instruction has unexpected remaining accounts

errors.name: TokenAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Confidential token account is not canonical

errors.name: AclNonceOverflow
errors.msg: ACL nonce overflow

errors.name: NonZeroInitialBalanceUnsupported
errors.msg: nonzero initial confidential balances are unsupported

errors.name: UnderlyingMintMismatch
errors.msg: Underlying mint does not match confidential mint

errors.name: VaultAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: Vault token account authority does not match vault authority PDA

errors.name: VaultAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Vault token account is not the canonical mint vault

errors.name: AclDomainKeyMismatch
errors.msg: Confidential mint ACL domain key is invalid

errors.name: ComputeSignerMismatch
errors.msg: Compute signer does not match confidential mint

errors.name: CurrentAclRecordMismatch
errors.msg: current ACL record does not match token account state

errors.name: AmountHandleTypeMismatch
errors.msg: transfer amount handle type is invalid

errors.name: AmountAclMismatch
errors.msg: transfer amount ACL record is invalid

errors.name: TotalSupplyAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: total supply authority does not match mint

errors.name: DisclosureProofSignatureMissing
errors.msg: disclosure proof signature is missing or invalid

errors.name: VerifierSetMismatch
errors.msg: verifier set account is invalid

errors.name: VerifierThresholdNotMet
errors.msg: verifier-set proof threshold was not met

errors.name: DuplicateVerifierSignature
errors.msg: verifier-set proof contains a duplicate signer

errors.name: RequestWitnessMismatch
errors.msg: request witness does not match

errors.name: RequestWitnessUnavailable
errors.msg: request witness is expired or already consumed

errors.name: MaterialCommitmentMismatch
errors.msg: material commitment witness does not match

errors.name: PublicDecryptNotReleased
errors.msg: handle is not released for public decrypt

errors.name: CallbackSettlementMismatch
errors.msg: transfer callback settlement accounts are invalid

errors.name: ReceiverHookMismatch
errors.msg: receiver hook return data is invalid

errors.name: ReceiverHookInputTooLarge
errors.msg: receiver hook input exceeds program limits

errors.name: InvalidFheEvalPlan
errors.msg: FHE eval plan is invalid

errors.name: DuplicateFheEvalAccount
errors.msg: FHE eval account list contains a duplicate account

errors.name: UnexpectedFheEvalAccount
errors.msg: FHE eval account list contains an unexpected account

errors.name: MissingFheEvalAccount
errors.msg: FHE eval plan is missing a required dynamic account

errors.name: FheEvalAccountNotWritable
errors.msg: FHE eval dynamic account must be writable

errors.name: DuplicateFheOutputAuthority
errors.msg: FHE eval output authority list contains a duplicate authority

errors.name: UnexpectedFheOutputAuthority
errors.msg: FHE eval output authority list contains an unexpected authority

errors.name: MissingFheOutputAuthority
errors.msg: FHE eval plan is missing a required output authority

types.name: AclRecord
docs: Canonical ACL state for one host handle.
The account address is independent from the opaque handle:
`PDA("acl-record", nonce_key, nonce_sequence)`. The handle is stored in the
account body so computed handles can be bound after transaction accounts are
declared.

fields.name: handle
docs: Opaque FHEVM handle controlled by this ACL record.

fields.name: nonce_key
docs: Domain-separated nonce key derived from app account metadata.

fields.name: nonce_sequence
docs: App-maintained sequence for this nonce key.

fields.name: acl_domain_key
docs: App-level ACL domain, such as a confidential token mint.

fields.name: app_account
docs: App-owned account whose encrypted field is represented by this handle.

fields.name: encrypted_value_label
docs: Domain-separated encrypted field label inside `app_account`.

fields.name: subjects
docs: Inline subjects for the common case.

fields.name: subject_roles
docs: Role flags parallel to [`AclRecord::subjects`].

fields.name: subject_count
docs: Number of valid entries in the inline subject arrays.

fields.name: overflow_subject_count
docs: Number of overflow subjects represented by [`AclPermission`] PDAs.

fields.name: public_decrypt
docs: Durable public-decrypt flag checked by KMS-style verification.

fields.name: material_commitment
docs: Canonical material commitment PDA sealed to this ACL record.

fields.name: material_commitment_hash
docs: Canonical material commitment hash sealed to this ACL record.

fields.name: material_key_id
docs: Material key identifier sealed to this ACL record.

fields.name: created_slot
docs: Slot in which this ACL record was first bound.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this record.

fields.name: request

fields.name: verifier_set

docs: Verifier-set version expected to certify the response.

fields.name: expires_slot

types.name: BalanceHandleUpdateReason

types.name: BalanceHandleUpdatedEvent
docs: App-local balance history event.
This event is for frontend/app indexers. The generic coprocessor listener
consumes ZamaHost protocol events instead.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: owner
docs: Token account owner.

fields.name: token_account
docs: Confidential token account.

fields.name: old_handle
docs: Previous balance handle.

fields.name: old_acl_record
docs: Previous ZamaHost ACL record.

fields.name: new_handle
docs: New balance handle.

fields.name: new_acl_record
docs: New ZamaHost ACL record.

fields.name: reason
docs: Reason this balance pointer changed.

types.name: BurnRedemption
docs: Replay marker for a redeemed burned amount handle.

docs: Confidential mint whose vault paid the redemption.

fields.name: owner

types.name: BurnRedemptionRequest
docs: Account-backed witness for a burned-amount redemption request.

docs: Token account that produced the burned amount.

docs: Underlying SPL mint for the vault and destination.

fields.name: destination_owner
docs: Destination token account owner.

fields.name: destination_account
docs: Destination token account to receive redeemed underlying tokens.

fields.name: burned_handle
docs: Burned amount handle.

fields.name: burned_acl_record
docs: ACL record for `burned_handle`.

fields.name: material_commitment
docs: Material commitment account for `burned_handle`.

fields.name: material_commitment_hash
docs: Canonical material commitment hash.

fields.name: material_key_id
docs: Material key identifier.

fields.name: host_config
docs: Host config whose chain id and gates were validated.

fields.name: verifier_set
docs: Verifier set expected to certify the redemption.

fields.name: verifier_set_version
docs: Verifier-set version expected to certify the redemption.

fields.name: request_nonce
docs: Caller-supplied nonce that makes the request PDA unique.

fields.name: request_hash
docs: Canonical hash over this request witness.

fields.name: chain_id
docs: Host chain id copied from the validated host config.

fields.name: expires_slot
docs: Last slot in which this request can be consumed.

fields.name: status
docs: Request lifecycle state.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this request account.

docs: Underlying token destination owner.

fields.name: destination_account
docs: Underlying token destination account.

fields.name: request
docs: Account-backed request witness.

fields.name: request_hash
docs: Canonical request hash stored in the witness.

fields.name: verifier_set
docs: Verifier set expected to certify the response.

fields.name: verifier_set_version
docs: Verifier-set version expected to certify the response.

fields.name: expires_slot
docs: Last slot in which this request can be consumed.

types.name: ConfidentialAmountKind
docs: Token-scoped amount purpose used for amount-handle birth.

types.name: ConfidentialBurnEvent
docs: Emitted when a confidential burn computes the all-or-zero burned amount.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: owner
docs: Token account owner.

fields.name: token_account
docs: Token account whose balance was debited.

fields.name: burned_handle
docs: Encrypted amount actually burned.

fields.name: burned_acl_record
docs: ZamaHost ACL record for `burned_handle`.

types.name: ConfidentialMint
docs: Confidential mint state for the token PoC.

fields.name: authority
docs: Admin/authority that created the mint.

fields.name: acl_domain_key
docs: ACL domain key, currently equal to the mint pubkey.

fields.name: compute_signer
docs: Program-controlled compute signer PDA.

fields.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint wrapped by this confidential mint.

fields.name: disclosure_verifier_set
docs: Active threshold verifier set accepted for KMS disclosure certificates.

fields.name: redemption_verifier_set
docs: Active threshold verifier set accepted for KMS burn-redemption certificates.

fields.name: decimals
docs: Decimal precision inherited from the underlying mint.

fields.name: total_supply_handle
docs: Current encrypted total-supply handle.

fields.name: total_supply_acl_record
docs: Current ZamaHost ACL record for `total_supply_handle`.

fields.name: next_total_supply_nonce_sequence
docs: Next nonce sequence to use for a total-supply ACL record.

types.name: ConfidentialMintMigratedEvent
docs: Emitted when a legacy mint is migrated to split verifier-set pointers.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: authority
docs: Mint authority that authorized the migration.

fields.name: legacy_kms_verifier_authority
docs: Legacy single KMS verifier authority retained for auditability.

fields.name: disclosure_verifier_set
docs: Active disclosure verifier set after migration.

fields.name: redemption_verifier_set
docs: Active burn-redemption verifier set after migration.

fields.name: disclosure_verifier_set_version
docs: Disclosure verifier-set version after migration.

fields.name: redemption_verifier_set_version
docs: Burn-redemption verifier-set version after migration.

fields.name: migrated_slot
docs: Slot in which the mint was migrated.

types.name: ConfidentialTokenAccount
docs: Confidential token account state.

fields.name: owner
docs: Token account owner.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint this account belongs to.

fields.name: balance_handle
docs: Current confidential balance handle.

fields.name: balance_acl_record
docs: Current ZamaHost ACL record for `balance_handle`.

fields.name: next_balance_nonce_sequence
docs: Next nonce sequence to use for a balance ACL record.

fields.name: next_amount_nonce_sequence
docs: Next nonce sequence to use for owner-scoped random amount ACL records.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for the token account.

types.name: ConfidentialTransferEvent
docs: Emitted when a confidential transfer computes the all-or-zero moved amount.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: from_owner
docs: Sender token account owner.

fields.name: from_token_account
docs: Sender confidential token account.

fields.name: to_owner
docs: Recipient token account owner.

fields.name: to_token_account
docs: Recipient confidential token account.

fields.name: transferred_handle
docs: Encrypted amount actually transferred.

fields.name: transferred_acl_record
docs: ZamaHost ACL record for `transferred_handle`.

types.name: DisclosureRequest
docs: Account-backed witness for a public disclosure request.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint whose ACL domain scopes the request.

fields.name: requester
docs: User/app authority that requested disclosure.

fields.name: token_account
docs: Balance token account for balance mode, or default for amount mode.

fields.name: app_account
docs: ACL app account stored in the host ACL record.

fields.name: handle
docs: Requested handle.

fields.name: acl_record
docs: ACL record for the requested handle.

fields.name: material_commitment
docs: Material commitment account for the requested handle.

fields.name: material_commitment_hash
docs: Canonical material commitment hash.

fields.name: material_key_id
docs: Material key identifier.

fields.name: host_config
docs: Host config whose chain id and gates were validated.

fields.name: verifier_set
docs: Verifier set expected to certify the response.

fields.name: verifier_set_version
docs: Verifier-set version expected to certify the response.

fields.name: request_nonce
docs: Caller-supplied nonce that makes the request PDA unique.

fields.name: request_hash
docs: Canonical hash over this request witness.

fields.name: chain_id
docs: Host chain id copied from the validated host config.

fields.name: expires_slot
docs: Last slot in which this request can be consumed.

fields.name: mode
docs: Disclosure request mode.

fields.name: status
docs: Request lifecycle state.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this request account.

types.name: HandleMaterialCommitment
docs: Host-owned commitment proving ciphertext material is available for a handle.
ACL birth and material readiness are deliberately separate. KMS-style
decryption checks must verify both the canonical ACL record and this
material commitment before authorizing a decryptable handle.

fields.name: acl_record
docs: ACL record whose handle has committed material.

fields.name: handle
docs: Handle copied from the ACL record at commitment time.

fields.name: key_id
docs: Release/key identifier for the ciphertext material.

fields.name: ciphertext_digest
docs: Digest of the ciphertext material.

fields.name: sns_ciphertext_digest
docs: Digest of the SNS ciphertext material.

fields.name: coprocessor_set_digest
docs: Release-pinned coprocessor-set digest.

fields.name: material_commitment_hash
docs: Canonical commitment hash over the material witness fields.

fields.name: created_slot
docs: Slot in which the commitment was recorded.

fields.name: state
docs: Commitment state. Native-v0 decryptability requires committed.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this material commitment.

types.name: HostConfig
docs: Singleton host configuration and authority surface.
`HostConfig` is the runtime switchboard for this PoC. Production-shaped
instructions reject while paused, and mock/test-only instructions require
both the corresponding feature gate and configured signer.

fields.name: admin
docs: Program administrator allowed to update config flags.

fields.name: chain_id
docs: Host-chain id included in handle derivation.

fields.name: input_verifier_set
docs: Active threshold verifier set for input verification paths.

fields.name: input_verifier_set_version
docs: Version of the active input verifier set, or zero before the first set is created.

fields.name: material_authority
docs: Configured authority for material-commitment paths.

fields.name: test_authority
docs: Configured signer for `test_emit_*` shims.

fields.name: paused
docs: Pauses production-shaped host instructions when true.

fields.name: mock_input_enabled
docs: Enables the mock encrypted-input bind instruction.

fields.name: test_shims_enabled
docs: Enables test event shim instructions.

fields.name: grant_deny_list_enabled
docs: Enables deny-list checks for persistent grant authorities.

fields.name: updated_slot
docs: Slot in which the config was initialized or last changed.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `PDA("host-config")`.

types.name: MintVerifierSetsUpdatedEvent
docs: Emitted when a mint rotates the token-scoped verifier sets used for new KMS requests.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: authority
docs: Mint authority that authorized the update.

fields.name: old_disclosure_verifier_set
docs: Previous disclosure verifier set.

fields.name: new_disclosure_verifier_set
docs: New disclosure verifier set.

fields.name: old_redemption_verifier_set
docs: Previous burn-redemption verifier set.

fields.name: new_redemption_verifier_set
docs: New burn-redemption verifier set.

fields.name: disclosure_verifier_set_version
docs: New disclosure verifier-set version.

fields.name: redemption_verifier_set_version
docs: New redemption verifier-set version.

fields.name: updated_slot
docs: Slot in which the mint pointers changed.

types.name: RandomAmountCreatedEvent
docs: Emitted when the token program creates a token-scoped random amount.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: owner
docs: Token account owner.

fields.name: token_account
docs: Confidential token account.

fields.name: amount_kind
docs: Whether this amount is intended for transfer or burn.

fields.name: bounded
docs: True when the random amount was bounded.

fields.name: upper_bound
docs: Bound supplied to ZamaHost for bounded random amounts, or zero bytes for unbounded amounts.

fields.name: handle
docs: Newly created amount handle.

fields.name: acl_record
docs: ZamaHost ACL record initialized for the amount.

fields.name: nonce_sequence
docs: Nonce sequence used for the amount ACL record.

types.name: TotalSupplyHandleUpdatedEvent
docs: App-local total-supply history event.
This mirrors ERC7984's encrypted `_totalSupply` pointer at the Solana mint
level. The generic coprocessor listener consumes ZamaHost protocol events;
this event is for token-aware indexers.

fields.name: version
docs: Event schema version.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint.

fields.name: old_handle
docs: Previous total-supply handle.

fields.name: old_acl_record
docs: Previous ZamaHost ACL record.

fields.name: new_handle
docs: New total-supply handle.

fields.name: new_acl_record
docs: New ZamaHost ACL record.

fields.name: reason
docs: Reason this total-supply pointer changed.

types.name: TotalSupplyUpdateReason
docs: Reason code for [`TotalSupplyHandleUpdatedEvent`].

types.name: TransferCallbackSettlement
docs: Replay marker for a transfer callback settlement.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint whose transfer was settled.

fields.name: from_owner
docs: Original sender owner.

fields.name: from_token_account
docs: Original sender token account.

fields.name: to_owner
docs: Original recipient owner.

fields.name: to_token_account
docs: Original recipient token account.

fields.name: sent_handle
docs: Prior transfer's encrypted all-or-zero sent handle.

fields.name: sent_acl_record
docs: ACL record for `sent_handle`.

fields.name: callback_success_handle
docs: Encrypted receiver callback success bit.

fields.name: callback_success_acl_record
docs: ACL record for `callback_success_handle`.

fields.name: refund_handle
docs: Encrypted amount actually refunded.

fields.name: refund_acl_record
docs: ACL record for `refund_handle`.

fields.name: to_balance_handle
docs: Recipient balance handle after the prepared refund debit.

fields.name: to_balance_acl_record
docs: ACL record for `to_balance_handle`.

fields.name: from_balance_handle
docs: Sender balance handle after the finalized refund credit.

fields.name: from_balance_acl_record
docs: ACL record for `from_balance_handle`.

fields.name: transferred_handle
docs: Encrypted amount that remains transferred after refund.

fields.name: transferred_acl_record
docs: ACL record for `transferred_handle`.

fields.name: status
docs: Settlement lifecycle status.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `(mint, sent_handle)`.

types.name: TransferReceiverHookCall
docs: One-shot marker for a receiver hook call.

fields.name: mint
docs: Confidential mint whose transfer reached the receiver hook.

fields.name: from_token_account
docs: Original sender token account.

fields.name: to_token_account
docs: Original recipient token account.

fields.name: sent_handle
docs: Prior transfer's encrypted all-or-zero sent handle.

fields.name: sent_acl_record
docs: ACL record for `sent_handle`.

fields.name: callback_success_handle
docs: Encrypted receiver callback success bit.

fields.name: callback_success_acl_record
docs: ACL record for `callback_success_handle`.

fields.name: receiver_program
docs: Receiver hook program that returned the callback witness.

fields.name: caller
docs: Sender that invoked the hook.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `(mint, sent_handle)`.

types.name: VerifierSet
docs: Fixed-size threshold verifier set for host-facing signature proofs.

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin that created and may disable this set.

fields.name: kind
docs: Protocol purpose for this set.

fields.name: scope
docs: Scope that disambiguates sets of the same kind.
Input sets are scoped to the host config PDA. Token disclosure and
redemption sets are scoped to the confidential mint they certify.

fields.name: version
docs: Monotonic version chosen by the admin for rotation.

fields.name: threshold
docs: Number of distinct signer signatures required.

fields.name: signer_count
docs: Number of active entries in `signers`.

fields.name: signers
docs: Fixed signer list. Entries after `signer_count` must be default keys.

fields.name: state
docs: Active/disabled state.

fields.name: created_slot
docs: Slot in which the set was created.

fields.name: updated_slot
docs: Slot in which the set was last updated.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for the canonical verifier-set address.
